# VisDrone-DET2019 Download Instructions

VisDrone-DET2019 should be downloaded from the official VisDrone project page:

https://github.com/VisDrone/VisDrone-Dataset

This repository does not redistribute VisDrone images or annotations. The dataset is used only for front-end UAV small-object detection evaluation corresponding to Main Table 1 and Main Fig. 3.

After downloading the validation split, place the dataset outside the Git repository and update the local path in the evaluation configuration. The compact split reference used by this repository is:

data/processed/detection_splits/visdrone_val_list.txt
